name: GTA
description: First road car produced by GTA Motor in 1965, known for its mid-engine layout and powerful performance.

name: GTA Stradale
description: A road-legal version of the GTA race car, produced from 1970 to 1972.

name: Bimotre Maserati
description: A collaboration with Maserati to create a high-performance sports car in the 1970s.

name: GTA 63
description: A limited edition road car celebrating the brand's 63rd anniversary in 2025.

name: GTA Spia
description: A roadster version of the GTA, produced from 1967 to 1968.

name: GTA TZ2
description: A racing version of the GTA, produced from 1967 to 1969.

name: GTA TZ2+
description: An evolution of the GTA TZ2 with improved performance, produced from 1969 to 1970.

name: GTA'003
description: A limited edition road car with a hybrid powertrain, produced from 2018 to 2020.

name: GTA'50
description: A limited edition road car celebrating the brand's 50th anniversary in 2013.

name: GTA'75
description: A limited edition road car celebrating the brand's 75th anniversary in 2038.
